name: dolibarr
description: Reads and writes Dolibarr ERP/CRM third parties, contacts, products, customer invoices, and orders through the Dolibarr REST API.

risk.read: external Dolibarr instance read of ERP/CRM business data
risk.write: external mutation; creates/updates/deletes live Dolibarr third parties, contacts, products, invoices, and orders, and validates draft invoices/orders
risk.approval: required for every write action; delete_* actions are irreversible in Dolibarr
